# position(timeIntervalSinceLatestBoot:)

**Instance Method**

Returns a position representing time since the last boot in the series of entries.

## Declaration

```swift
func position(timeIntervalSinceLatestBoot seconds: TimeInterval) -> OSLogPosition
```

## Accessing Position

- **position(date:)**: Returns a position representing the time specified.
- **position(timeIntervalSinceEnd:)**: Returns a position representing time since the end of the time range that the entries span.

items.description: Returns a position representing the time specified.
items.name: position(date:)

items.description: Returns a position representing time since the end of the time range that the entries span.
items.name: position(timeIntervalSinceEnd:)
